# DEPLOYMENT REPORT: PermitFlow System

## Generated by The Deployment Guardian (Phase 5 - Deployment)

### Deployment Status: ✅ READY

**Report Date:** March 5, 2026  
**Project:** PermitFlow - Intelligent Permit Management  
**Version:** 1.0.0-MVP  

---

## Build Summary

### Build Configuration
- **Framework:** Next.js 14.2.35
- **Build Mode:** Static Export (SSG)
- **Target Environment:** Static Website
- **Node Version:** 18.x+
- **Package Manager:** npm

### Build Commands
```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Build for production
next build

# Output directory
/out (configured in next.config.js)
```

---

## Deployment Options

### Option 1: Vercel (Recommended)
Vercel is the native platform for Next.js applications.

**Steps:**
```bash
# Install Vercel CLI
npm i -g vercel

# Login
vercel login

# Deploy
vercel --prod
```

**Environment Variables Needed:**
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` (for future API integration)

**Expected Output:**
```
✅ Production deployment ready
🔗 https://permitflow.vercel.app
```

### Option 2: Static Hosting (Netlify, GitHub Pages, S3)
```bash
# Build static export
npm run build

# Deploy /out directory
# Upload contents to hosting provider
```

### Option 3: Self-Hosted (nginx)
```bash
# Copy build output
cp -r out/* /var/www/permitflow/

# Configure nginx
server {
  listen 80;
  server_name permitflow.local;
  root /var/www/permitflow;
  index index.html;
  
  location / {
    try_files $uri $uri.html $uri/ =404;
  }
}
```

---

## Production Checklist

### Pre-Deployment
- [x] Build passes without errors
- [x] All routes generate static HTML
- [ ] Environment variables configured
- [ ] Domain configured (optional)
- [ ] Analytics integrated (optional)

### Post-Deployment
- [ ] Homepage loads < 2s
- [ ] All interactive elements work
- [ ] Mobile layout verified
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] 404 page working

### Security
- [x] No API keys in client bundle
- [x] No sensitive data exposed
- [x] HTTPS enforced

---

## Monitoring & Maintenance

### Health Checks
```bash
# Homepage
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://permitflow.vercel.app
# Expected: 200

# Static assets
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://permitflow.vercel.app/_next/static/css/
# Expected: 200 or 404 index
```

### Performance Budgets
- First Contentful Paint: < 1.5s
- Time to Interactive: < 3s
- Bundle Size: < 300KB

---

## Rollback Plan

If deployment fails:
1. Identify last working deployment in Vercel dashboard
2. Click "Promote to Production" on previous deployment
3. Debug issue in staging/development
4. Redeploy after fix

---

## Known Limitations (MVP)

1. **Static Data Only** - No backend API integration
2. **No Authentication** - Demo mode with mock user
3. **No Real-time Updates** - Theater uses static data
4. **Limited Permit Types** - 7 types supported
5. **No Government Integration** - Simulated responses

### Future Enhancements
- Database integration with Prisma
- NextAuth.js for authentication
- OpenAI API for Concierge chat
- Government API connectors
- Real-time status updates via WebSockets
- Mobile app (React Native)

---
